creator: james@elstone.net
text:
Hi Dan,

The latest release of Curator does not support ESv5 yet, see my comment #5. I believe that a compatible version of Curator is in the pipeline but no eta.

Is there anything I can do in support of this being progressed to closure please?

Happy to switch this to a New Port, following the naming convention of ES1,2,latest...

Your guidance would be most welcomed!

Kr,

James.
